column1: # Final Radiant standalone extraction inventory for OPT-269.
# This inventory classifies every current Rust source, test, or example file
# under this crate that still contains Sempal-domain terminology. It is not the
# active backlog; Linear is. The issue column points at the implementation
# ticket that owns the final disposition.
# - pattern: exact path under the Radiant crate, or a directory prefix ending in /**
# - issue: Linear issue that owns the final disposition

column4: Sempal model action hotkey automation and DTO contracts must move to Sempal.
Compatibility namespace is transitional and should disappear after Sempal owns the shell contract.
Crate-root docs and deprecated app export still mention the Sempal compatibility path.
Module docs still expose native_shell as Sempal compatibility infrastructure.
Native-shell compatibility tree must split generic primitives from Sempal shell composition and move/delete the rest.
Runtime facade still documents and exports Sempal compatibility entrypoints.
Native Vello facade still mixes generic and Sempal compatibility runtime entrypoints.
Native Vello tree mixes generic runtime support with Sempal shell input render startup and test glue.
